word: G330 - ἀναθάλλω - anathállō - an-ath-al'-lo - Flourish again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναθάλλω

- Transliteration: Anathallo

- Phonetic: an-ath-al'-lo

- Definition:

1. to shoot up, sprout again, grow green again, flourish again

- Origin: from G303 and thallo (to flourish)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and θάλλω thallō (to flourish); to revive: - flourish again.
